title: ScaleTargetPriority Property
description: Sets and returns whether to find the ScaleTarget neighborhood preferentially at the object detection.
notes:
Sets and returns whether to find the ScaleTarget neighborhood preferentially at the object detection.

By setting this property to "True" when change of largeness for the object to be found is small, detection speed may decrease. When change of largeness for the object to be found is large, set this property to "False". Detection is possible with either setting. Set the value according to the work pieces to be used since unsuitable setting may decrease detection speed.

See Also: ScaleTargetPriority Property
